The ElevenLabs Conversational AI API enables developers to build interactive voice agents that can engage in natural, real-time conversations. It provides REST endpoints for managing agents, conversations, knowledge bases, tools, and phone number integrations. The API supports multi-turn dialogue across 70+ languages and is designed for building customer service agents, voice assistants, and interactive voice response systems.
